def deduplicate_ids(records):
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for record in records:
        rid = record["id"]
        if rid not in seen:
            seen.add(rid)
            unique.append(rid)
    return unique


def find_new_entries(existing, incoming):
    existing_set = set(existing)
    return [item for item in incoming if item not in existing_set]


def filter_seen(events, seen_set):
    result = []
    for event in events:
        eid = event["event_id"]
        if eid not in seen_set:
            seen_set.add(eid)
            result.append(event)
    return result
